resources.string: This app needs to be set as your default SMS app to send, receive, and manage your text messages. Without setting it as default, you might miss important messages or notifications. You can always change this later in your phone settings.
Make This Your Primary Messaging App
Permission denied and app not set as default SMS app
Allow this permission to enable essential features to appear over other apps for enhanced functionality
Request for Overlay Permission to Enhance App Functionality
Please grant the necessary overlay permission to ensure the app functions properly and provides an enhanced user experience
Your recent conversations will appear here once you start messaging…
Your conversations will appear here once you start searching…
Automatically send a message, at the exact moment you’d like
Hey! Are you free to meet tomorrow?
Sounds good. Do you want to discuss the project updates?
Confirm that message were sent successfully
When composing a message,only show mobile numbers
If your longer text message are failing to send, or sending in the wrong order, you can send them as MMS message instead.
Re-sync your message with the native Android SMS database
Tap outside of the pop-up to close it
Message will be deleted after the specified number of days
Drop incoming messages from blocked senders instead of hiding them
Are you sure you would you like to delete this conversation ?
This is the start of your conversation. Say Something nice!
The sender does not support replies
Are you sure you want to unblock this number?
Permission denied or app is not eligible: %1$s
App is not default SMS app
App must be default SMS app to delete messages
Are you sure you want to block this number?
Please select a future time for schedule message
Do you want to blur the wallpaper background for a softer visual effect?
Password not created. Please try again!
When disabling this option, messages from private contacts will not pop up at notification.
Use in case of forget password
What was your childhood Best-friend\'s name?
What was your childhood School name?
What was your Primary School name?
Please enter correct security question and answer
Please select language you want to translate it
Location permission is required to get your address
Long Press on home screen and Select Widgets.
Click on Messages from widget list to set on home screen.
Now you can quickly access messages.
This action already taken into other button
Are you sure you want to block this conversations ?
Are you sure you want to unblock this conversations ?
In a meeting, will call you back later.
On the way, will be there soon.
I am fine, do not worry.
I need 6 months of vacation… twice a year. ✈️
I love my job only when I am on vacation.
I am not lazy, I am just on my energy saving mode.
There is no sunrise so beautiful that it is worth waking me up to see it.
I am not completely useless, I can be used as a bad example.
if people could read my mind, I had get punched in the face a lot.
Don’t worry, I’ve got jokes for days. Just none today. 🤡
Someday you will go far, and I hope you stay there.
Not wearing glasses anymore, I have seen enough…
I do not understand your specific kind of crazy, but I do admire your total commitment to it.
A day without sunshine is like, you know, night.
Just thinking about you puts a smile on my face.
You’re the peanut butter to my jelly. 🥜🍓
My day seems incomplete without you.
The most important thing in this world is family and love.
You can not blame gravity for falling in love.
You\'re the reason I check my phone. 📱💖
You are the most beautiful person, both inside and out, I am so lucky to have you.
A million thanks to the most amazing person I know.
There are no words I could use to describe the love we share. I am so incredibly thankful for you.
Love is when you have options to leave, but you decide to stay.
I like when you smile. But, I love it when I am the reason…
Love understands love; it needs no talk.
Cheers to another year of greatness! 🍰🎈
Wishing you strength and focus to achieve your goals! 💪✨
All the best! I wish you all best for a prosperous future ahead.
Happy birthday! May all your dreams come true!
May today bring calm and clarity. 🌈
Merry Christmas! Spread love everywhere you go
The most important thing is to enjoy your life to be happy. It is all that matters.
Wishing you a day full of smiles and sunshine. 🌞
Sometimes, when things are falling apart, they may actually be falling into place.
May your hard work bring you success and satisfaction. 🎯
You are braver then you believe, and stronger than you seem, and smarter than you think.
Sending you best wishes for an amazing journey ahead!
Happy Birthday! Wishing you joy and success always! 🎉🎂
Congratulations! Cheers to your success and a bright future!
A dead end is just a good place to turn around.
Take care of yourself. You matter. 🌸
May your hearts always beat as one. 💞
When you have a dream, you have got to grab it and never let go.
Trust is hard. Especially after it’s broken
Givers need to set limits because takers rarely do.
Don\'t cling to mistake just because you spent a long time making it.
I’m fine. Just tired… of everything. 🖤
I realize now that the person I used to be is not the person.
Sadness is not the opposite of happiness. It\'s a part of it.
The worst kind of pain is when your heart cry, and your eyes are dry.
Time can\'t heal your emotional pain if you don\'t learn how to let go.
They say \'Follow your heart\',but your heart is a million pieces, which piece do you follow?
Sometimes, silence is the loudest cry. 🤐💔
If there is anything that is true in your life, it is the present passing moment. Sadness is part of it.
Another chapter has to end before a new one can begin.
Smiling on the outside, broken on the inside. 😢
Behind every sweet smile, there is a bitter sadness that no one can ever see and feel.
Best friends are like stars — always there, even if you can’t see them. ✨
A best friend is like a four leaf clover, hard to find, lucky to have.
A friend eye is a good mirror.
You\'re not just a friend, you\'re family. ❤️👬
Friends are God\'s way of taking care of us.
You smile I smile, you get hurt I get hurt, you cry I cry, you jump off a bridge, I am gonna miss you buddy.
True friends are like diamonds, pure and rare. \nFake friends are like leaves found everywhere.
No distance can break real friendship. 🌍🤝
True friend will open your eyes, mind and heart to a better more fulfilling life.
A friend is someone who understand your past, believes in your future abd accepts you today, just the way you are.
Real friends don’t need daily talks — just real connection. 🔗
To have true friends, you must be a true friends.
You always know how to make me smile. 😄
Friendship is like violin. Music may stop now or then but strings may be together forever.
The enemy of my enemy is my friend.
Happy Birthday! Wishing you all the happiness in the world. 🎂❤️
May your birthday be full of joy, love and celebration. You deserve the very best!
Hoping all your birthday wishes come true!
I can not think of a better gift than your friendship - Happy Birthday!
Cheers to another trip around the sun!
Another year older, wiser, and more fabulous. ✨🥳
Forget the past; Look forward to the future,for the best things are yet to come.
Enjoy your special day to the fullest! 🥂🎂
You\'re older today than yesterday but younger than tomorrow, happy birthday!
Happy birthday to someone who is forever young!
A simple celebration, a gathering of friends; here wishing you great happiness and a joy that never ends.
Best wishes on your birthday! May you have maximum fun today, and minimum hangover tomorrow!
Wishing you a year filled with love and joy. 💕🎁
Today is about you. I can\'t wait to celebrate you all day long!
Grow through what you go through. 🌱
A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
Life begins at the end of your comfort zone. 🚪
The great pleasure in life is doing what people say you cannot do.
Create a life you don’t need a vacation from. 🌴
You can not have better tomorrow if you are thinking about yesterday all the time.
Happiness is not a goal, but a wat of life.
Be careful with your words. Once they are said. they can only be forgiven, not forgotten.
Doubt kills more dreams than failure ever will. 🚫💭
If you do not live for something, you will die for nothing.
Recognize the small things - they are usually means the most.
To forgive takes strength. to forget takes foolishness.
Fall seven times, stand up eight. 🔁
Life is all about dreams. Dreams big and achieve big things in life.
Everything is alright in the end. If it is not alright, it is not the end…
One day or day one — you decide. ⏳
It is never too late to be what you might have been.
You have to believe in yourself when no one else does.
Work hard. Push yourself, because on one else is going to do it for you.
Life has got all those twists and turns. You have got to hold on tight and off you go.
Work hard in silence. Let success speak. 🎯
Keep your face always toward the sunshine, and shadows fill fall behind you.
Success is not final, failure is not fatal; it is the courage to continue that counts.
Do not allow people to dim your shine because they are blinded. Tell them to put some sunglasses on.
Not having the best situation, but seeing the best in your situation is the key.
No filter. No fear. Just facts. 🎯
I’m not heartless — I just learned how to use mine wisely. 🧊❤️
Silent but deadly — like my comebacks. 💣
Take me as I am, or watch me as I go. 🚪
The best thing about being me, I am limited edition, there are no other copies!
The only difference between me and madman is that I am not mad.
If you think I am bad, then come to me, I will give you better reason to hate me.
Life is runway, and I am the damn supermodel.
They say good things take time, that is why I am always late.
I am too busy being a boss.
Life is short, smile while you still have teeth.
Do not study me you won\'t graduate.
No makeup, no problem. Unfiltered and unapologetic.
No GPS is needed, I am on my own path.
Your contacts, messages, and personal data stay on your device - we don\'t store, share, or upload any personal information.
We are committed to keeping your personal messages private and secure.
Your data stays on your device — we never share or store it.
Your privacy is at the heart of our mission.
Please accept privacy policy of our app.
Set as Your Default SMS App
Set as your default to send, receive, and manage messages effortlessly
Send & receive all SMS in one place
Rooted devices can pose security risks and may cause unexpected behavior
Unable to open Root Manager Options
Are you sure you want to leave application ?
Speech recognize not supported in your device
Are you sure you want to delete this quick response?
Set up one-tap replies to save time when messaging
This message cannot be deleted because it is a default quick response…
No starred messages found. Star your important texts, images, or links to access them quickly.
Your blocked and spam conversation will show up here…
This is not a Phone number
No application found to open this link
Are you sure you would you like to delete this message ?
View full chat to unlock all options
No app found to share content
Your privacy drives our mission and guides everything we create.
All your texts, one smart inbox. Stay connected without the clutter.
Your chats, always safe. Restore them anytime, anywhere.
Lock away private talks. Privacy that truly protects you.
No more junk texts. Only the messages that matter reach you.
We never upload, sell, or share your personal messages or contacts.
The app may request permissions (SMS, Contacts, Storage) only to provide its core features.
We do not collect or transfer your personal information to our servers.
Make Messages Your Default SMS App
Set Messages as your default app to send, receive, and organize all SMS in one place
Set your own picture or let the app use your theme color as the default background
Help us improve our tool to best suit your needs by rating us here!
No browser app found. Please install one to view the privacy policy.
To be fair, it’s been pretty boring here lately, so yeah, I’m free.
Yes, let’s finalize the project for Friday. Looking forward to it.
We need this permission to give you better user experience
Allow app to read phone state
Enable our quick action feature in 3 steps
You have forcefully denied some of the required permissions for this action. Please open settings, go to permissions and allow them.
Send message to anyone with ease!
View message by just one tap!
Can\'t talk now, I\'ll call you back soon.
Sorry, I missed your call. What\'s up?
Busy at the moment. Will reply shortly.
Let me know if it\'s urgent.
Can’t talk right now. Text me instead?
To send or receive SMS messages, this app must be set as the default messaging app.
Click the \"Enable\" button to proceed with enabling permissions.
Locate #Messages in the list to proceed with the next step.
Swipe the toggle to turn on.
Slide the toggle switch to enable and activate the feature.
No Contacts app found on this device
This permission is required to After call features, please allow this permission.
Please wait while the ad loads…
You’re offline. \n Turn on your internet connection to access all messages features.
You can quickly send a message right after a call
Turn on notifications to receive message alerts.
First select one or more messages
We do not store & share your call or message data.
Enable required features to use messaging. Your data stays private and secure on your device.
